title: limonium viniolae
intro: Limonium viniolae, also known as sea lavender, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Limonium viniolae include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a good night's sleep. The herbal preparations of Limonium viniolae typically involve infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
